rulings.Case Title: JAMES KEARNEY VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, April 13, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Atlas Heating & Ventilating Company, Ltd.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Plaintiffs¿ discovery responses are factually devoid. Plaintiffs¿ evidence fails to create a triable issue whether the fireproofing at the Hillsdale Shopping Center and the San Francisco International Airport contained asbestos. Robert Cantley lacks foundation for his conclusion that the fireproofing Atlas employees disturbed in Mr. Kearney¿s presence contained asbestos. =(220/JJM)
